examples: However, the discontinuity hypothesis can pose problems of its own.
the problem is that there's a discontinuity in the wage spectrum.
Ad hoc approaches inevitably fail and result in business discontinuity (such as system outages).
The curve jumping creates discontinuity and oftentimes, open up expectation chasm among the leadership team.
Its growth is the quintessential emergent process, characterized by uncertainty and punctuated by discontinuity.
